GG0170D3_STND_END_CD GG0170D3 Mobility: Sitting to Standing Ability at Discharge Indicates the patient's ability to move to a standing position from a sitting position in achair or on the side of the bed at discharge. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only prior to or following the activity.
